advice.summary: You are currently in the base training phase, focusing on building endurance and strength. Your recent weight training sessions are contributing positively to your overall fitness.
advice.focus: Prioritize recovery and manage your training load to prevent fatigue.
advice.nextSession: Plan a light recovery run or an easy aerobic session to maintain consistency without overloading.
advice.caution: Watch for signs of fatigue due to recent acute load spikes.
